**Job Experience:**  
**Teaching Assistant** | [Institution Name]

Maintained detailed records of student progress and used this data to make informed decisions. Assisted lead teachers in developing interactive and engaging learning materials to capture students’ attention and enhance their comprehension.  

**Camp Director** | [Camp Name]  
[Start Date] – [End Date]  
Effectively managed camp budgets, optimised spending and reducing costs through financial planning. Fostered a collaborative and cohesive team of 10 staff, leading to improved morale, communication, and teamwork, thereby positively impacting the overall camp experience for campers and staff. Oversaw logistical aspects of the camp, including transportation, scheduling, and resource management, ensuring smooth and efficient operations. Successfully managed and resolved any stakeholder conflicts, including parents, staff, school representatives, etc., maintaining a harmonious camp environment.  

**Camp Leader & Coordinator** | [Camp Name]

Planned and executed comprehensive camp programs that catered to 5-12 years old and interests, resulting in an increase in camper enrolment and overall program satisfaction. Ensured strict adherence to health and safety guidelines, leading to zero major incidents or accidents during the camp’s duration.  

**Educational Assistant** | [School Name]

Ensured an organised and productive learning environment, emphasising discipline, punctuality, and teamwork. Assisted in managing administrative and preparatory tasks, such as record keeping, filing, maintaining equipment, and handling communication. Collaborated with lead teachers to develop and adapt instructional materials, adapted to evolving curricular requirements and fostered a growth mindset.
